message.content:
**Bug Report: Mobile Banking App Crashes During Internal Account Transfers Over $5,000**

**Title:**  
App Crash on Internal Money Transfer Exceeding $5,000 Threshold

**Environment:**  
- App Version: 2.3.1 (Build 456)  
- Device: Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra  
- OS: Android 14 (One UI 6.1)  
- App Build Date: 2024-09-15  
- Network: Wi-Fi (stable, 5GHz)  
- User Account: Verified with two linked savings/checking accounts (total balance ~$20,000)

**Steps to Reproduce:**  
1. Launch the Mobile Banking app and log in with valid credentials.  
2. Navigate to "Transfer" > "Between My Accounts."  
3. Select source account (e.g., Checking) and destination account (e.g., Savings).  
4. Enter transfer amount: $5,001.00 (or any amount > $5,000).  
5. Tap "Review & Transfer."  
6. Confirm the transfer on the review screen.  

**Expected Behavior:**  
The app processes the transfer successfully, deducts the amount from the source account, credits the destination account, and displays a confirmation screen with transaction details and receipt.

**Actual Behavior:**  
The app crashes immediately after tapping "Confirm" on the review screen. The app closes to the home screen without processing the transfer. No error dialog appears prior to crash. Restarting the app shows no pending transaction or notification.

**Severity:**  
High (blocks core functionality for high-value internal transfers, potential financial loss or user frustration)

**Logs/Error Messages:**  
*(From device logcat capture via Android Studio, filtered for app process):*  

```
2024-10-05 14:32:17.456 D/TransferService: Initiating internal transfer: amount=5001.00 USD, from=Checking123, to=Savings456
2024-10-05 14:32:17.523 W/TransactionValidator: High-value transfer detected (>5000). Applying compliance checks...
2024-10-05 14:32:17.567 E/ComplianceRuleEngine: FATAL: Threshold violation in InternalTransferRule#validateHighValue. NullPointerException at line 245
java.lang.NullPointerException: Attempt to invoke virtual method 'boolean java.lang.String.isEmpty()' on a null object reference
    at com.bankapp.transfer.ComplianceRuleEngine.validateHighValue(ComplianceRuleEngine.java:245)
    at com.bankapp.transfer.TransferService.processInternalTransfer(TransferService.java:178)
    at com.bankapp.ui.TransferActivity$5.onClick(TransferActivity.java:312)
2024-10-05 14:32:17.589 F/DEBUG: *** *** *** *** *** *** *** *** *** *** *** *** *** *** *** ***
2024-10-05 14:32:17.612 I/art: Starting a blocking GC for 12 allocations...
2024-10-05 14:32:17.645 F/android_runtime: FATAL EXCEPTION [main]
    Process: com.bankapp.mobile, PID: 12345
    java.lang.RuntimeException: Unable to finish activity...
```

**Additional Notes:**  
- Issue consistent across 3 test attempts on the same device/account.  
- Transfers ≤ $5,000 succeed without issue.  
- No crash observed on iOS simulator (iPhone 15, iOS 17.6).  
- Attached: Screenshot of review screen, full logcat export (logcat_20241005_1432.zip).
